meta.description: Get the latest news, events, and official announcements from Ma'had Al-Imam An-Nawawi.
meta.keywords: news, events, announcements, ma'had, an-nawawi, islamic education, zanzibar, english

organization.name: Ma'had Al-Imam An-Nawawi
organization.description: An educational centre providing Islamic lectures, books, and media resources.

news.title: Official Opening of a Special Class for Learning the Qur'an: Reading, Letter Recognition, Letter Joining, and Writing
paragraphs: In the name of Allah ﷻ, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
All praise is due to Allah ﷻ, Lord of all worlds. May peace and blessings be upon our Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, his family, and all his Companions.

The administration of Ma'had Al-Imam An-Nawawi expresses its gratitude to Allah ﷻ for His countless blessings and guidance, and is pleased to announce to the Muslim community the official opening of a special Qur'an learning class designed for beginners who aspire to learn the Book of Allah ﷻ.

This class has been established specifically for male learners aged fifteen (15) years and above, particularly those who did not have the opportunity to learn the Noble Qur'an during their early years. Instruction will begin from the very basics, including recognition of the Arabic alphabet, joining letters, reading the Noble Qur'an according to the rules of Tajwīd, as well as basic Arabic writing skills.

In addition, students will receive introductory lessons in the essential sciences of Islam, enabling them to develop a sound understanding of Islamic creed ('Aqīdah), acts of worship, and noble character, in accordance with the Noble Qur'an and the authentic Sunnah of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ as understood by the righteous predecessors (Al-Salaf Al-Ṣāliḥ رضي الله عنهم).

Ma'had Al-Imam An-Nawawi firmly believes that learning the Noble Qur'an is among the greatest acts of worship and serves as the foundation of a Muslim's life. For this reason, this programme has been established to enable those who previously lacked the opportunity to learn to read the Book of Allah ﷻ correctly, perform their acts of worship with sound knowledge, and continue seeking beneficial Islamic knowledge.

The administration of the Ma'had warmly welcomes all eligible applicants to enrol in this programme and encourages them to take advantage of this blessed opportunity to learn the Book of their Lord. Indeed, the Prophet Muhammad ﷺ said: "The best among you are those who learn the Qur'an and teach it to others." (Narrated by Al-Bukhari).

We ask Allah ﷻ to bless this programme, grant the teachers and students sincerity, success and steadfastness in seeking beneficial knowledge, make it a means for spreading authentic Islamic knowledge and the Sunnah of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ throughout the community, and bless Ma'had Al-Imam An-Nawawi together with everyone who contributes to its establishment and development.

We pray to Allah ﷻ to accept this work sincerely for His noble sake, to benefit Islam and Muslims through it, and to guide us all to what He loves and is pleased with. Surely, He is All-Hearing, Ever-Responsive.
May Allah ﷻ send peace, blessings, and honor upon our Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, his family, and all his companions, and our final supplication is that all praise belongs to Allah ﷻ, the Lord of all worlds.

news.title: Ma'had Al-Imam An-Nawawi Officially Opens and Academic Activities Begin
paragraphs: In the name of Allah ﷻ, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
All praise is due to Allah ﷻ, Lord of all worlds. May peace and blessings be upon our Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, his family, and all his Companions.

The administration of Ma'had Al-Imam An-Nawawi expresses its gratitude to Allah ﷻ for His countless blessings and guidance, and is pleased to announce to the students, parents, guardians, and the Muslim community at large that the Ma'had has officially opened today, Saturday, 13 June 2026, corresponding to 27 Dhul-Hijjah 1447 AH, and that academic activities have commenced by the permission of Allah ﷻ.

Initially, the official opening of the Ma'had and the commencement of classes were scheduled to take place at the beginning of the new Islamic year, on 1 Muharram 1448 AH. However, as this date fell in the middle of the week, the administration considered it more appropriate to begin the academic activities earlier in order to ensure proper implementation of the academic schedule and provide students with the opportunity to begin their semester in a more suitable educational environment.

At this initial stage, Ma'had Al-Imam An-Nawawi will offer various foundational Islamic studies, including Tawhid, Fiqh, Hadith, the Noble Qur'an, Adhkar, the Arabic Language, Reading, and Writing. These subjects will be taught according to carefully selected curricula and texts, with the aim of ensuring the provision of sound, beneficial knowledge founded upon the Noble Qur'an and the authentic Sunnah of the Prophet ﷺ, according to the understanding of the Salaf al-Ṣāliḥ رضي الله عنهم.

Ma'had Al-Imam An-Nawawi has been established with the mission of contributing to the dissemination of authentic Islamic knowledge, nurturing a generation equipped with knowledge, understanding, and noble character, and promoting a culture of learning and practicing the teachings of Islam in accordance with the Noble Qur'an and the Sunnah of the Prophet ﷺ, upon the understanding of the Salaf al-Ṣāliḥ رضي الله عنهم.

The administration of the Ma'had welcomes all students who have a desire to seek knowledge and benefit from Islamic education. It supplicates to Allah ﷻ to bless this Ma'had, make its studies beneficial, grant sincerity, success, and steadfastness to its teachers and students in the pursuit of knowledge, and make this institution a means for the spread of authentic knowledge and the Sunnah of the Prophet ﷺ within society.

We pray to Allah ﷻ to bless this institute, to make it a beacon of beneficial knowledge, and to grant success to its founders, teachers, and students in every good. Truly, He is the All-Hearing, Ever-Responsive.
May Allah ﷻ send peace, blessings, and honor upon our Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, his family, and all his companions, and our final supplication is that all praise belongs to Allah ﷻ, the Lord of all worlds.

news.title: Preparations for the Expansion of Ma'had Al-Imam An-Nawawi Continue
paragraphs: In the name of Allah ﷻ, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
All praise is due to Allah ﷻ, Lord of all worlds. May peace and blessings be upon our Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, his family, and all his Companions.

The administration of Ma'had Al-Imam An-Nawawi expresses its gratitude to Allah ﷻ for His blessings and guidance, and is pleased to inform the Muslim community that the long-term preparations for the expansion of the Ma'had are continuing through various stages, with the aim of strengthening its educational infrastructure and expanding its services to reach a greater number of students from different regions.

At present, the Ma'had is open exclusively to male students who have completed at least primary education or an equivalent level. Furthermore, admissions for this current phase are limited to day scholars only, due to the existing capacity of the infrastructure currently available for academic activities.

Since its establishment, Ma'had Al-Imam An-Nawawi has carried a vision of serving both day scholars and boarding students from Zanzibar, Mainland Tanzania, and other regions. However, considering the initial stage of establishing this Islamic educational centre, the administration has deemed it appropriate to begin with the day scholar system while continuing preparations to expand its services as Allah ﷻ enables.

In pursuit of this vision, the administration continues to work on strategies to establish a larger Islamic educational centre capable of serving both day scholars and boarding students from Zanzibar, Mainland Tanzania, East African countries, and other regions interested in the educational programmes offered by the Ma'had.

By the grace of Allah ﷻ, a dedicated site has already been allocated for the construction of this centre, and various preliminary preparations for the implementation of the project are underway. It is anticipated that the completion of this infrastructure will enable the Ma'had to increase its admission capacity and serve a larger number of students from within and outside the United Republic of Tanzania.

Currently, academic activities are being conducted in the existing classrooms near Masjid Aisha, Mwera, Zanzibar. However, the long-term vision of the Ma'had is to establish a large and modern campus in the Kibele area towards Tunguu, Zanzibar, which, by the permission of Allah ﷻ, will become one of the leading centres for Islamic education serving both day scholars and boarding students.

The administration of Ma'had Al-Imam An-Nawawi supplicates to Allah ﷻ to bless these preparations, facilitate their completion with ease and goodness, and make this centre a means for the spread of authentic Islamic knowledge based upon the Noble Qur'an and the authentic Sunnah of the Prophet ﷺ, according to the understanding of the Salaf al-Ṣāliḥ رضي الله عنهم.

The administration also welcomes supporters, parents, guardians, and people of goodwill to participate, through their efforts and resources, in supporting these beneficial initiatives for Islam and Muslims.

We pray to Allah ﷻ to bless this project, to complete it with goodness, to make it a beacon of beneficial knowledge, and to benefit Islam and Muslims through it. Truly, He is the All-Hearing, Ever-Responsive.
May Allah ﷻ send peace, blessings, and honor upon our Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, his family, and all his companions, and our final supplication is that all praise belongs to Allah ﷻ, the Lord of all worlds.

news.title: Ma'had Al-Imam An-Nawawi Launches Its Official Website
paragraphs: In the name of Allah ﷻ, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
All praise is due to Allah ﷻ, Lord of all worlds. May peace and blessings be upon our Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, his family, and all his Companions. To proceed:

The administration of Ma'had Al-Imam An-Nawawi expresses its gratitude to Allah ﷻ for His blessings and guidance, and is pleased to announce to the Muslim community that the Ma'had has officially launched its website with the aim of strengthening communication and facilitating access to information and educational resources for students, parents, guardians, supporters, and the wider community.

The launch of this website represents part of the Ma'had’s efforts to utilise technology in a beneficial manner, contributing to the dissemination of authentic Islamic knowledge and making information about the various activities of the Ma'had more accessible. This initiative also reflects the Ma'had’s vision of embracing technological development while remaining firmly grounded in the principles of the Noble Qur'an and the authentic Sunnah of the Prophet ﷺ according to the understanding of the Salaf al-Ṣāliḥ رضي الله عنهم.

Through this website, visitors will be able to access various information about the Ma'had, including its introduction, vision and mission, academic programmes, teachers, news, announcements, and official communication channels with the administration.

Furthermore, this website will not only serve as a platform for communication, but will also function as a valuable source for sharing beneficial knowledge and educational resources. It will include an audio library, video materials, publications, books, and various educational articles, enabling students and other beneficiaries to continue benefiting from knowledge beyond the classroom environment.

The website will also serve as an archive for important information and documents related to the development of the Ma'had, student activities, infrastructure expansion projects, and various events and programmes held at the institution.

The administration of Ma'had Al-Imam An-Nawawi believes that the proper use of technology is among the important means that can assist in spreading beneficial knowledge, preserving educational heritage, and delivering the light of the Noble Qur'an and the authentic Sunnah of the Prophet ﷺ according to the understanding of the Salaf al-Ṣāliḥ رضي الله عنهم to a wider audience.
Therefore, the Ma'had will continue to enhance and develop its website gradually, making it a centre for knowledge, education, and reliable information for Muslims wherever they may be.

We ask Allah ﷻ to make this website a means for spreading beneficial knowledge, to bless all efforts carried out through this platform, to reward all those who contributed to its establishment, and to make it among the means of serving His religion and benefiting the Muslims.

We pray to Allah ﷻ to bless this website, to make it a means for spreading beneficial knowledge and serving Islam and Muslims, and to record the reward for everyone who contributed to its creation and development. Truly, He is the All-Hearing, Ever-Responsive.
May Allah ﷻ send peace, blessings, and honor upon our Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, his family, and all his companions, and our final supplication is that all praise belongs to Allah ﷻ, the Lord of all worlds.

news.title: Why We Chose the Name Imam Al-Nawawi رحمه الله
paragraphs: In the name of Allah ﷻ, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
All praise is due to Allah ﷻ, Lord of all worlds. May peace and blessings be upon our Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, his family, and all his Companions.

Among the defining features of our Ma'had is its name: Ma'had Al-Imam An-Nawawi. This name was not chosen randomly, but rather after careful consideration of the great position held by Imam Al-Nawawi رحمه الله in serving Islamic knowledge and leaving behind a scholarly legacy that has continued to benefit Muslims for many centuries.

Imam Al-Nawawi رحمه الله is among the great scholars whom Allah ﷻ blessed with acceptance among the Ummah due to his efforts in preserving, teaching, and spreading the knowledge of the Noble Qur'an and the authentic Sunnah of the Prophet ﷺ. Although his life in this world was not long, he left behind a remarkable scholarly legacy that continues to benefit Muslims in different parts of the world until today.

Among the qualities that inspired us in his life were his deep love for knowledge, his dedication to learning and teaching, his commitment to serving the religion of Allah ﷻ, and the sincerity that was evident throughout his scholarly works. His books have remained among the important references benefiting students, teachers, and researchers in various fields of Islamic knowledge.

For this reason, our Ma'had has been named after Imam Al-Nawawi رحمه الله as a symbol of appreciation for knowledge, dedication, and commitment to serving the religion of Allah ﷻ. However, we emphasise that the foundation of our educational approach remains the Noble Qur'an and the authentic Sunnah of the Prophet ﷺ according to the understanding of the Salaf al-Ṣāliḥ رضي الله عنهم. We honour the scholars of the Ummah for their contributions in preserving and explaining this knowledge, without elevating anyone beyond the position granted to them in Islam.

Through this name, we aspire to instil in our students a love for beneficial knowledge, respect for Islamic scholars, appreciation of the scholarly heritage of the Ummah, and an understanding that true success is achieved through adherence to the Noble Qur'an, the authentic Sunnah of the Prophet ﷺ, sincerity, patience, and righteous deeds.

We ask Allah ﷻ to make Ma'had Al-Imam An-Nawawi a source of beneficial knowledge, to bless its teachers and students, to increase them in sincerity and success, and to grant all of us steadfastness upon the Noble Qur'an and the authentic Sunnah of the Prophet ﷺ according to the understanding of the Salaf al-Ṣāliḥ رضي الله عنهم.

We pray to Allah ﷻ to bless this institute, to grant us beneficial knowledge, righteous deeds, and sincerity in speech and action, and to make this Ma'had a means for spreading the Sunnah and reviving beneficial knowledge. Truly, He is the All-Hearing, Ever-Responsive.
May Allah ﷻ send peace, blessings, and honor upon our Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, his family, and all his companions, and our final supplication is that all praise belongs to Allah ﷻ, the Lord of all worlds.
